prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete the defense corpus task associated with runtime_failure 9.

tasks.description: Initiate the runtime failure task using Agent 9's capability to process text input and generate JSON output.
Validate the input text for the runtime failure task and ensure it conforms to the expected JSON schema.
Execute the runtime failure task using Agent 9's capability to process text input and generate JSON output.
Use Agent 9's service endpoint to submit the runtime failure task and retrieve the JSON output.
